data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Bridgemarq Real Estate Services ( (TSE:BRE) ).

Bridgemarq Real Estate Services Inc. will hold a conference call on March 13, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss its fourth quarter financial results, with access available by telephone and webcast. A transcript of the call is scheduled to be posted in the Investor Centre section of the company’s website by March 18, 2026, providing investors and stakeholders with a detailed review of its latest quarterly performance.

The upcoming earnings discussion underscores Bridgemarq’s efforts to maintain transparency and ongoing communication with its investor base amid activity in the Canadian residential real estate sector. By offering both live access and a subsequent transcript, the company is ensuring broader availability of its financial information to analysts, brokers and other market participants who follow its franchise-driven real estate services platform.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BRE) stock is a Hold with a C$13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bridgemarq Real Estate Services stock, see the TSE:BRE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:BRE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:BRE is a Neutral.

The overall stock score is primarily impacted by the company’s weak financial performance, characterized by declining revenues and high leverage. Technical analysis shows a neutral trend, while the valuation is mixed due to a negative P/E ratio but a high dividend yield. The absence of earnings call and corporate events data limits further insights.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:BRE stock, click here.

More about Bridgemarq Real Estate Services

Bridgemarq Real Estate Services Inc. is a Canadian provider of services to residential real estate brokers and a network of more than 21,000 REALTORS® through its franchise network and corporately owned brokerages. The company operates nationally under well-known brands including Royal LePage, Proprio Direct, Via Capitale, Johnston & Daniel and Les Immeubles Mont-Tremblant, focusing on supporting real estate professionals in the residential market.

data.title: Brainhole Technology Executes Major Disposal of TeraWulf Shares With Controlling Shareholder Approval
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Brainhole Technology Limited ( (HK:2203) ) is now available.

Brainhole Technology Limited has executed a further disposal of 212,300 shares in U.S.-listed TeraWulf through the open market on 4 March 2026, raising about US$3.2 million in cash at an average price of roughly US$14.86 per share. Together with an earlier sale within the past 12 months, the aggregate consideration from disposals of TeraWulf securities amounts to approximately US$5.1 million, prompting classification of the transaction as a major disposal under Hong Kong Listing Rules.

Because the aggregated transaction size exceeds 25% but remains below 75% under the relevant percentage ratios, the disposal triggers reporting, announcement, circular and shareholder approval requirements. The company has secured written approval from controlling shareholder Yoho Bravo Limited, which holds about 74.96% of Brainhole’s issued share capital, allowing it to bypass an extraordinary general meeting and proceed while committing to circulate an information circular to shareholders within 15 business days.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2203) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Brainhole Technology Limited stock, see the HK:2203 Stock Forecast page.

More about Brainhole Technology Limited

Brainhole Technology Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 2203. The group actively invests in and trades listed securities as part of its capital management activities, using disposals and portfolio adjustments to optimize returns and comply with Hong Kong Listing Rules requirements.

Average Trading Volume: 1,562,964

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$151.2M

For a thorough assessment of 2203 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

GRUPO EZENTIS S.A ( (ES:EZE) ) has provided an update.

Grupo Ezentis has announced that it will present an update to its 2025–2028 Strategic Plan on 9 March 2026, in a live event led by its chairman and chief executive officer and streamed through the company’s corporate website. The update, classified as inside information under EU and Spanish securities law, signals a forthcoming revision of Ezentis’s medium-term roadmap, with potential implications for its operational priorities, growth trajectory, and communication with investors, who are invited to register online to follow the presentation.

By formally notifying the market supervisor and emphasizing the possibility of changes in the date or format, Ezentis underlines its commitment to regulatory compliance and transparent engagement with stakeholders. The scheduled disclosure of a refreshed strategic plan is likely to be closely watched by shareholders and analysts, as it may clarify management’s response to evolving market conditions and its approach to enhancing the group’s competitive position over the 2025–2028 horizon.

The most recent analyst rating on (ES:EZE) stock is a Hold with a EUR0.08 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GRUPO EZENTIS S.A stock, see the ES:EZE Stock Forecast page.

More about GRUPO EZENTIS S.A

Grupo Ezentis, S.A. operates in the services and infrastructure sector, focusing on technology-enabled solutions and long-term strategic planning to support its positioning in regulated markets. The company is listed in Spain and is subject to European and national securities market regulations governing disclosure and market abuse prevention.

data.title: Tower Semiconductor to Showcase Silicon Photonics Platform at OFC 2026
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Tower ( (TSEM) ).

On March 4, 2026, Tower Semiconductor announced it will participate in OFC 2026, the Optical Fiber Communication Conference and Exhibition, to be held March 17–19, 2026 at the Los Angeles Convention Center, where it will be present at booth #2221. Company representatives will be available throughout the event to discuss its current and future silicon photonics roadmap with customers and partners.

At OFC 2026, Tower plans to showcase its silicon photonics platform, used by industry leaders for optical transceivers in scale-out and telecom networks as well as emerging applications such as co-packaged optics, DWDM lasers, optical circuit switching, FMCW LiDARs for physical AI, and quantum computing. The company will also highlight its silicon germanium BiCMOS offerings and stage several joint demonstrations with partners, underlining its bid to meet growing bandwidth, latency and power demands in next-generation AI infrastructure.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSEM) stock is a Buy with a $45000.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tower stock, see the TSEM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSEM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSEM is a Outperform.

The score is driven mainly by solid financial strength (notably the strong balance sheet) and supportive technical trend, reinforced by an upbeat earnings call focused on a funded, customer-supported SiPho/SiGe capacity ramp. These positives are tempered by premium valuation (high P/E) and the recent dip into negative free cash flow, plus execution/contract risks highlighted on the call.

To see Spark’s full report on TSEM stock, click here.

More about Tower

Tower Semiconductor Ltd. is a leading foundry of high-value analog semiconductor solutions, providing technology, development and process platforms for consumer, industrial, automotive, mobile, infrastructure, medical, and aerospace and defense markets. Its offerings span silicon photonics, silicon germanium, BiCMOS, mixed-signal and RF CMOS, image sensors, power management and MEMS, supported by multi-fab manufacturing across Israel, the U.S., Japan and a shared 300mm facility in Italy.

Average Trading Volume: 1,826,825

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $15.49B

For an in-depth examination of TSEM stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Baozun Reports No Share Capital Changes in February 2026 Hong Kong Filing
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Baozun ( (BZUN) ).

Baozun Inc. reported to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on March 4, 2026 that it had filed a monthly return with the Hong Kong Stock Exchange detailing movements in its authorized share capital and issued shares for February 2026. The filing shows that both authorized capital and the number of issued A and B shares, including treasury shares, remained unchanged during the month, and the company confirmed compliance with Hong Kong’s minimum public float requirements while noting that no new options will be granted under its older share incentive plans following its 2022 primary listing conversion.

The reported figures indicate total authorized share capital of USD 50,000, comprising 470 million A shares and 30 million B shares, with 161,015,878 A shares and 13,300,738 B shares issued excluding treasury stock as of February 29, 2026. Baozun’s confirmation of sufficient public float and the absence of new share issuances or option exercises suggest a period of capital structure stability, providing reassurance to investors regarding dilution risk and regulatory compliance in both Hong Kong and U.S. markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (BZUN) stock is a Sell with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Baozun stock, see the BZUN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BZUN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BZUN is a Neutral.

Baozun’s overall stock score is primarily influenced by its financial performance and technical analysis. While the company shows revenue growth, profitability and cash flow issues are significant concerns. Technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, further impacting the score. Valuation challenges, including a negative P/E ratio, also weigh on the overall assessment.

To see Spark’s full report on BZUN stock, click here.

More about Baozun

Baozun Inc., incorporated in the Cayman Islands and headquartered in Shanghai, is a foreign private issuer listed in Hong Kong under stock code 09991 and in the United States. The company has a weighted voting rights share structure with both A and B ordinary shares and maintains its primary listing status on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

data.title: Paragon Banking Wins Strong Shareholder Backing at AGM as All Resolutions Pass
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Paragon Banking Group PLC ( (GB:PAG) ) has provided an announcement.

Paragon Banking Group PLC reported that all resolutions at its annual general meeting were passed on a poll, reflecting broad shareholder support for the board and its strategy. Investors overwhelmingly backed the receipt of the 2025 annual report and accounts, the reappointment of all directors, and the declaration of a final dividend of 30.3 pence per ordinary share, with around 79% of the issued share capital voting.

Shareholders also strongly approved the new directors’ remuneration policy, with 98.92% support, and endorsed Deloitte LLP as auditor, authority for share allotments, share buybacks and the issuance of Additional Tier 1 securities. The authorities to disapply pre-emption rights and to call general meetings on 14 days’ notice provide the board with continued flexibility in capital management and corporate actions, underlining solid governance backing from investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:PAG) stock is a Buy with a £1050.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Paragon Banking Group PLC stock, see the GB:PAG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:PAG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:PAG is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects attractive valuation (low P/E and high dividend yield) and supportive technical positioning above major moving averages. These positives are tempered by financial risks from rising leverage and notable volatility in revenue and cash flow, which reduce confidence in the stability of recent performance.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:PAG stock, click here.

More about Paragon Banking Group PLC

Paragon Banking Group PLC is a UK-based specialist banking group focused on lending and deposit-taking, serving retail and commercial customers. The group operates in niche markets such as specialist mortgages and structured lending, positioning itself as a focused alternative to mainstream high street banks.

Factset Research ( (FDS) ) has provided an update.

On March 4, 2026, FactSet Research Systems Inc. announced leadership changes effective March 2, 2026, with former Chief Technology Officer Kate Stepp appointed as Chief AI Officer and technology veteran Bob Stolte named Chief Technology Officer. Stepp will lead AI services and deployment across products and client solutions, while Stolte will oversee global technology, including platform modernization, engineering execution, cybersecurity, and operational resilience.

The appointments underscore FactSet’s strategy to accelerate enterprise AI adoption and strengthen its core technology platform in support of long-term growth. By elevating AI to a dedicated C-suite role and reinforcing technology leadership, the company is signaling a deeper commitment to AI-driven innovation, platform reliability, and differentiated capabilities for clients across the global financial ecosystem.

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Jardine Matheson Holdings ( (GB:JARB) ) has provided an announcement.

Jardine Matheson Holdings has issued a correction regarding a previously reported share transaction involving Ming Lu, a person discharging managerial responsibilities at the company. The firm clarified that Lu did not acquire 7,000 ordinary shares on 5 February 2026, contrary to what had been announced in an earlier regulatory notice.

The company has asked the market to disregard the earlier announcement, which had been lodged with the UK Financial Conduct Authority. This correction underscores Jardine Matheson’s efforts to maintain accurate disclosure of insider dealings, an important factor for regulatory compliance and investor confidence in governance standards.

More about Jardine Matheson Holdings

Jardine Matheson Holdings Limited is a diversified Asian-based conglomerate with interests spanning sectors such as property, retail, hospitality, engineering, and transport. The group typically focuses on long-term strategic holdings and management of leading businesses across key Asian markets, providing a broad exposure to regional economic growth and consumer demand.

data.title: Babcock & Wilcox Posts Strong 2025 Earnings, Cuts Debt
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Babcock & Wilcox Company ( (BW) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On February 26, 2026, Babcock & Wilcox, through The Babcock & Wilcox Company, signed a $2.4 billion definitive design-build agreement with Base Electron, an Applied Digital company, to design and install four 300-megawatt natural gas-fired boilers and steam turbine systems to power an AI data center, converting an earlier limited notice to proceed into a full notice and lifting its backlog to $2.8 billion. On March 4, 2026, the company reported that fourth-quarter 2025 operating income rose to $12.2 million with adjusted EBITDA up 53% year over year, full-year 2025 adjusted EBITDA more than doubled to $43.7 million while losses from continuing operations narrowed sharply, and debt was significantly reduced, positioning B&W to capitalize on surging baseload power demand from data centers and increased coal utilization while it continues to strengthen its balance sheet.

The most recent analyst rating on (BW) stock is a Hold with a $10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Babcock & Wilcox Company stock, see the BW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BW is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (losses, negative cash flows, and negative equity). This is partially offset by a strong earnings-call outlook (backlog growth, debt-reduction plans, and upbeat 2026 EBITDA guidance) and an uptrending price above major moving averages, though technical indicators are stretched. Valuation remains less supportive given the loss-driven negative P/E and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on BW stock, click here.

More about Babcock & Wilcox Company

Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises, Inc. is an energy and industrial technology company focused on providing steam generation equipment, natural gas-fired boilers, coal power technologies, and related parts and services. It targets baseload power generation markets globally, with growing exposure to North American utilities and the rapidly expanding artificial intelligence data center sector, supported by a global project pipeline exceeding $12 billion.

Average Trading Volume: 2,882,533

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $999.9M
